problem: What material stores hydrogen fuel at high density without safety risk?
hypothesis: Combining Aerogel porosity for thermal/acoustic insulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Synthesis and characterization with 13 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
